issues.description: Card has significant effects (name alias, Double Attack, Banish) but effects array is empty. Missing: (1) name alias rule for Kouzuki Oden, (2) Double Attack keyword/modifier, (3) Banish trigger that trashes target on damage without activating Trigger

suggestedDsl.effectText:
Also treat this card's name as [Kouzuki Oden] according to the rules.
[Double Attack] (This card deals 2 damage.)
[Banish] (When this card deals damage, the target card is trashed without activating its Trigger.)
suggestedDsl.notes: Name alias (Kouzuki Oden) is typically handled outside DSL effects array in card metadata. Double Attack and Banish are intrinsic keywords on this card.
